summary: AdviceOS Enterprise Features Testing - Iteration 98. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). All 4 frontend pages verified working: Replay Advice, Cost Reduction Dashboard, Risk & Control Mapping (with both Matrix AND Table views), Breach Register (with ASIC reporting).

issues: Important Information modal appears on every page load - consider adding 'Don't show again' option or localStorage persistence (noted in previous iteration)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 pages functional, all tabs and buttons working)

seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for sessions, risks, controls, and breaches during API testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 enterprise features verified working. Replay Advice has full audit trail with ASIC-ready export. Cost Reduction Dashboard has ROI calculator with configurable inputs. Risk & Control Mapping shows both Matrix AND Table views side by side per user request. Breach Register has ASIC reporting with deadline tracking.

features_verified.Replay Advice - GET /api/replay/sessions: PASS - Returns list of advice sessions
features_verified.Replay Advice - POST /api/replay/demo/cr: PASS - Creates demo session with ADV-DEMO-{uuid} format
features_verified.Replay Advice - GET /api/replay/session/: PASS - Returns full session with timeline, inputs, scenarios, decisions, compliance_checks
PASS - Returns timeline view with summary
PASS - Exports ASIC-ready format with export_metadata, regulatory_notes
features_verified.Replay Advice - GET /api/replay/dashboar: PASS - Returns total_sessions, monthly_sessions, completion_rate, exports_generated
features_verified.Cost Reduction - GET /api/cost-reduction: PASS - Returns summary, compliance_efficiency, breakdown_by_type, adviser_productivity, audit_readiness
features_verified.Cost Reduction - POST /api/cost-reductio: PASS - Calculates ROI with configurable inputs (num_advisers, files_per_month, etc.)
features_verified.Cost Reduction - GET /api/cost-reduction: PASS - Returns today and this_week metrics
features_verified.Cost Reduction - POST /api/cost-reductio: PASS - Logs efficiency event with time_saved and cost_saved
features_verified.Risk Control - GET /api/risk-control/ris: PASS - Returns risk register with by_rating breakdown
features_verified.Risk Control - GET /api/risk-control/con: PASS - Returns control register with by_effectiveness breakdown
features_verified.Risk Control - GET /api/risk-control/map: PASS - Returns risk-control matrix with coverage status
features_verified.Risk Control - GET /api/risk-control/das: PASS - Returns GRC dashboard with risk_summary, control_summary, review_status, regulatory_alignment
features_verified.Risk Control - POST /api/risk-control/ri: PASS - Creates new risk with risk_rating
features_verified.Breach Register - GET /api/breaches/regi: PASS - Returns breach list with asic_reportable_count, pending_asic_report
features_verified.Breach Register - GET /api/breaches/dash: PASS - Returns summary, by_severity, by_category, asic_reporting, remediation, criteria
features_verified.Breach Register - POST /api/breaches/reg: PASS - Registers new breach with BRH-{date}-{uuid} format
features_verified.Breach Register - GET /api/breaches/regi: PASS - Returns breach details with timeline
features_verified.Breach Register - GET /api/breaches/repo: PASS - Generates regulatory breach report with certification hash
features_verified.Frontend - /replay-advice page loads: PASS - Shows sessions list, stats cards, tabs (Sessions, Replay, Exports)
features_verified.Frontend - /cost-reduction page loads: PASS - Shows ROI metrics, live efficiency metrics, tabs (Overview, Breakdown, Calculator, ROI)
features_verified.Frontend - /risk-control page loads: PASS - Shows Matrix AND Table views side by side, tabs (Matrix View, Risks, Controls, Table View)
features_verified.Frontend - /breach-register page loads: PASS - Shows breach list, ASIC reportable status, tabs (Register, ASIC Reporting, Dashboard, Criteria)

replay_advice.description: Full audit replay capability for advice journey

risk_control_mapping.description: CPS 230 / ISO 31000 aligned enterprise GRC framework
risk_control_mapping.views: Matrix AND Table views side by side per user request

breach_register.description: CPS 230 compliant breach management with ASIC reporting
